core_mechanism: renormalization-group flow to a non-trivial (interacting) fixed point, where universality of critical behavior near a continuous phase transition defines a finite continuum limit and yields scale-dependent effective couplings
brief_reason: The abstract centers on a non-trivial ultraviolet fixed point studied via the renormalization group and universality of critical behavior, taming ultraviolet divergences and producing a weakly scale-dependent coupling.
